
import React from 'react'
import { MDXTag } from '@mdx-js/tag'
export const readingTime = {"text":"1 min read","minutes":0.205,"time":12299.999999999998,"words":41}
import styles from './document.module.css'

export default class MDXContent extends React.Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props)
    this.layout = null
  }
  render() {
    const { components, ...props } = this.props

    return <MDXTag
             name="wrapper"
             
             components={components}>
<div className={styles.Document}>
<MDXTag name="h1" components={components} props={{"id":"about-me"}}>{`About Me`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`Hello!`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`I’m Manki Kim from South Korea.
I wrote this blog using James K Nelson’s create-react-blog template.`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`It’s great stuff and light rather than gatsby.`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}>{`This blog is hosted on github`}{`[cpro95.github.io]`}{`.`}</MDXTag>
</div>
           </MDXTag>
  }
}
